sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, names Array(String), values Array(Int32), nullable_value Nullable(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(names, 2) as sampled_names, arrayRandomSample(values, 4 + length(names)) as sampled_values FROM test_data;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(names, arrayRandomSample([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 1)[1]) as sampled_names FROM test_data;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(names, NULLIF(length(names), 0) + 1) as sampled_names FROM test_data WHERE nullable_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample([1, NULL, 3, 4], 3 + 3) as sampled_values FROM test_data;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(names, sum(arrayRandomSample(values, 2)) + 1) as sample_adjustment FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(names, if(nullable_value IS NOT NULL, nullable_value, 2)) as adjusted_sample FROM test_data;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(arrayRandomSample(names, 2), 1) as double_sample FROM test_data;
SELECT id, arrayRandomSample(names, values[1] + 2) as adaptive_sample FROM test_data WHERE values[1] <= 4;
